stats.fact: OpenAgents builds persistent agent networks that don't disappear after tasks complete — they continue to evolve and learn over time
OpenAgents Workspace provides a unique persistent URL (e.g., workspace.openagents.org/abc123) that teams can bookmark and return to anytime
85% of developers regularly use AI tools in 2026, with multi-agent systems becoming the dominant architecture pattern
OpenAgents natively supports both MCP and A2A protocols, enabling agents from different frameworks to collaborate
The global AI agents market is growing rapidly, with persistent agent networks emerging as the next major infrastructure layer
